response.justification: The candidate has some relevant experience in performance optimization and AI-related projects, but lacks direct experience in SoC and IP modeling, and hardware-software co-design.
strengths: Experience with performance optimization in various projects
Background in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
concerns: Lack of direct experience in SoC and IP modeling
No clear experience in hardware-software co-design
Limited experience in deep neural network training and inference optimization

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience in SoC and IP modeling
